title: Brazilian Fettuccine Alfredo
description: A creamy Brazilian-inspired twist on the Italian classic, with rich fettuccine pasta and a hint of yeasty flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
Meanwhile, melt yeast in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add butter to the saucepan and stir until melted.
Add Brazilian cheese to the saucepan and stir until melted and smooth.
Add cream to the saucepan and stir until heated through.
Add garlic to the saucepan and stir for 1 minute.
Drain fettuccine pasta and return to pot.
Add cheese sauce to fettuccine pasta and toss until coated.
